name: ENERGIZE urolithin A older-adult trial
summary: A double-blind placebo-controlled randomized trial of 1000 mg daily urolithin A for 4 months in adults aged 65 to 90 years.
population: 66 adults aged 65 to 90 years, randomized 1:1 to urolithin A or placebo

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Microbiome Metabolite Restoration, Selective Autophagy and Organelle Quality Control, and Mitophagy Enhancers because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in 66 adults aged 65 to 90 years, randomized 1:1 to urolithin A or placebo. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
